3277610.name: Ahon
3277610.description: Awakening in a remote and mysterious location, a girl finds herself amidst a landscape teeming with hostility, where enigmatic figures, and entities lurk in the shadows. As you navigate this unfamiliar territory, you must uncover the secrets of this strange place while evading dangers and findings a way to be reunited with your grandpa. Through exploration, puzzle-solving, and deepening narrative, players will unravel the mysteries of both the girl's past and the eerie world she finds herself in.
